full_text:
Yang Bai 楊白
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Bai (楊白). A general under Zhang Lu, he questioned Ma Chao’s ability. Yang Bai was affiliated with Zhang Lu.
